The reference measurement was performed with pure

Constant background caused by the thermal neutron
background in the reactor environment was subtracted.
The absorption cross section was extracted as a
function of the neutron velocity by applying three
-For the position of the sample behind the chopper.
-For neutrons reflected at the D2O surface, leading to
-For the UCN velocity within the potential of the D2O.
Absorption cross section was defined as
The ratio of the count rate for the samples with Gd to
the count rate without Gd provides the absorption CS .
The 1/v-law was also examined. Contrary to previous
measurement (see REL-REF of H.Rauch+) no significant
violation in the region above 3m/s was visible.
